chapters.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of an early embryo-like form inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a small curled developing baby inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a growing curled baby with a stylized spine and brain-development star inside a heart-shaped translucent womb.
Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a growing baby with soft sound waves and motion marks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb.
Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a growing baby with gentle breathing bubbles inside a heart-shaped translucent womb.
Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a larger curled baby with an open eye inside a heart-shaped translucent womb.
Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled baby in a head-down position inside a heart-shaped translucent womb.
Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a rounder curled baby inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with pastel growth motifs.
Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a full-term baby sleeping snugly inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with pastel stars and hearts.
